reading.title: Reading: Habit vs right now
reading.passage: I usually work in an office, but I am working from home today. She usually cooks dinner at seven, but right now, she is cleaning the kitchen instead.

questions.question: The writer is working from home today.
What is she doing right now?
questions.explanation: "right now, she is cleaning the kitchen instead."

reading.title: Reading: Review — Shopping and cooking now
reading.passage: I have some rice and a few vegetables for dinner. I have plenty of rice, but I don't have any meat. I am cooking some soup right now. Prices are increasing at the market this week.

questions.question: The writer has a lot of meat.
Prices are increasing this week.
questions.explanation: "Prices are increasing at the market this week."
